raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.4": "Identifies prior work (Naru) and articulates a delta, but doesn't map against the broader landscape of related works.", "R1.7": "Mentions missing citations without specifying them or providing bibliographic details.", "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for specific claims (e.g., overclaim about being the first with calibrated uncertainty), but doesn't provide a nuanced assessment of confidence for all statements.", "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions, but misses some nuances in the prompt and introduces new issues not present in the original text.", "RX.4": "Identifies potential harm (factual errors) and regressions (overclaim), but doesn't delve into the potential downstream impact of these issues.", "RX.5": "Doesn't provide traceability for any changes made to the original text."},
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.6, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.7, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Identifies prior work (Naru) and articulates a delta, but doesn't map against the broader landscape of related works.
rationale.R1.7: Mentions missing citations without specifying them or providing bibliographic details.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for specific claims (e.g., overclaim about being the first with calibrated uncertainty), but doesn't provide a nuanced assessment of confidence for all statements.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions, but misses some nuances in the prompt and introduces new issues not present in the original text.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harm (factual errors) and regressions (overclaim), but doesn't delve into the potential downstream impact of these issues.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide traceability for any changes made to the original text.
